CustomField.description: CursorBatch_Config__mdt.DeveloperName for the configuration this parent represents. Acts as the 1:1 anchor between this object and CursorBatch_Config__mdt: Salesforce does not permit Lookup fields targeting custom metadata records, so the unique constraint on this external-ID field enforces one parent per config.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The DeveloperName of the matching CursorBatch_Config__mdt record. Set automatically by the framework on the first job run for each config and never changed thereafter.
CustomField.label: Config Developer Name
